<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below. If something
doesn't apply, write "N/A" rather than deleting the section — it helps
reviewers scan consistently.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One to three sentences: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature (adds user-visible behavior)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, config
- [ ] `build` / `ci` — CI or build system
- [ ] **BREAKING CHANGE** — public API change (requires major-version bump at 1.0+)

## Language scope

<!-- Check every language this PR touches. New methods should touch ALL six. -->

- [ ] JavaScript (`js/`)
- [ ] TypeScript (`ts/`)
- [ ] Python (`python/`)
- [ ] Ruby (`ruby/`)
- [ ] Go (`go/`)
- [ ] Rust (`rust/`)
- [ ] Shared (`test/`, `scripts/`, `docs/`, root)

## Linked issue(s)

<!-- "Closes #123", "Refs #456", or "N/A". -->

Closes #

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change? Tick every box that applies. -->

- [ ] `npm test` — `scripts/verify.sh` matrix is green locally.
- [ ] `npm run lint` — all six linters clean.
- [ ] `npm run coverage` — no coverage regression vs. `main`.
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior (integration + unit where applicable).
- [ ] Edge cases covered (null body, deleted stub, dead item, HTTP 5xx, timeout).

## Docs updated

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` — added entry under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] `README.md` — feature matrix, quick-start, or per-language README updated.
- [ ] `DESIGN.md` — contract updated if the public surface changed.
- [ ] `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` — architectural notes updated if applicable.
- [ ] Public-symbol doc comments added/updated in source.

## Breaking changes

<!-- If "BREAKING CHANGE" is checked: describe the break, migration path, and
     why it's necessary. Otherwise: "None." -->

None.
